description: Top tags aggregate across records, weighted by views, and each tag cites the video_keys it came from.
assertions: a tag used in two videos has count 2
each tag entry cites its contributing video_keys
tags are ranked by count then total views

description: YouTube retention peaks and steepest-drop cliffs are surfaced; non-YouTube records are null-flagged, never estimated.
assertions: a YouTube record appears under insights with peaks and cliffs
an Instagram record appears under retention_unavailable
no retention is estimated for non-YouTube platforms

description: Average views are reported by duration bucket and by category, each cell citing its video_keys.
assertions: by_duration buckets videos and reports avg_views where views are known

description: With no transcripts imported, transcript themes return a no_transcripts flag pointing to library-complete; once transcripts exist, real spoken terms surface with citations.
assertions: an empty library returns flag no_transcripts and empty themes
a stored transcript surfaces a spoken term with its video_keys
themes are never invented from metadata

description: An empty library returns every section empty with the boundary note and no fabricated figures.
assertions: all four sections are present and empty
the boundaries note states retention is YouTube-only and revenue is Studio-CSV-only
